articles.title: Apple opens up App Store to new competition in Brazil
articles.description: Apple’s grip on iPhone app distribution is loosening in another major market: Brazil.

articles.title: MapTap, a daily geography game, is my new Wordle
articles.description: MapTap is a phone game that will make you feel smarter after you play it.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation loses another key leader as co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang resigns
articles.description: Wang's departure follows the resignation of fellow co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak and marks the latest in a string of high-profile exits at the EF.

articles.title: General Intuition in talks to raise $300M at around $2B valuation
articles.description: General Intuition is in talks to raise around $300 million at a roughly $2 billion valuation from backers including Jeff Bezos. The startup trains AI agents on spatial-temporal reasoning.

articles.title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
articles.description: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

articles.title: A tech worker-backed PAC is bringing a $5M knife to Big Tech’s $100M gunfight
articles.description: Guardrails positions itself as a populist political movement that runs on small donations from people in the trenches of the AI boom.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: Trading the bitcoin cycle
articles.description: Bitcoin’s 4-year cycle makes DCA costly. Learn why a cycle-smart strategy is essential for advisors to better manage volatility and maximize client returns.

articles.title: Bitcoin to $145K by October? Why this 'crazy accurate' 4chan prediction is sketchy
articles.description: A viral 4chan Bitcoin prediction appears to have nailed past BTC prices, but edited targets and impossible supply claims weaken its $145,000 call.

articles.title: What happens when ChatGPT becomes the front door to crypto
articles.description: ChatGPT could become crypto’s new onboarding gateway, making Bitcoin and wallets easier to use while creating new trust risks.

articles.title: Algorand unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028
articles.description: The announcement reflects a crypto's growing recognition that adopting quantum-resistant cryptography could take years, requiring changes not only to user wallets but also to core protocol infrastructure.

articles.title: Ledn adds Tether Gold as loan collateral, expanding Bitcoin-backed lending model
articles.description: Ledn’s addition of Tether Gold lending comes as tokenized commodities expand, with the sector accounting for nearly 17% of the $43 billion RWA market.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) jumps 10% while index declines
articles.description: Internet Computer (ICP) fell 4.1% and Sui (SUI) dropped 4%, leading the index lower from Wednesday.

articles.title: Alchemy's AI-driven identity and payment service gains access to Visa network
articles.description: The AgentCard integration with Visa Intelligent Commerce allows AI agents built on models from any provider, including OpenAI or Anthropic, to effect commercial transactions.

articles.title: Adobe adds its AI assistant to Premiere, Illustrator and InDesign
articles.description: Adobe is updating its Firefly AI assistant with new chops, and adding it to Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign and Frame.io.

articles.title: Capital B shareholders approve up to $120B in financing capacity for Bitcoin strategy
articles.description: Capital B shareholders approved up to $120 billion in financing capacity, including equity and credit instruments, to support the company's Bitcoin accumulation strategy.

articles.title: 政院提 2,100 億特別條例，分 5 年籌獲國防自主無人載具
articles.description: 為持續發展無人載具，行政院會今天通過相關草案，預計經費上限新台幣 2,100 億元，自今年8月至民國 120  […]

articles.title: Hive shares jumps 10% on $220m Canada sovereign AI infrastructure deal
articles.description: GPU cloud contract with Bell and Cohere strengthens HIVE's shift from bitcoin mining to high performance AI computing.

articles.title: The great rotation: Investors desert the Magnificent 7, crypto for AI bottlenecks
articles.description: Capital is flowing out of the largest tech companies and bitcoin as investors pile into semiconductors, memory stocks and space-related opportunities.

articles.title: G7 calls for joint action on North Korean crypto theft, cybercrime
articles.description: G7 leaders broadened their warning over North Korean crypto theft to include wider cybercrime as researchers link DPRK-affiliated actors to billions of dollars in stolen digital assets.
